creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
can you pls check it with "portlint -AC"?

I see this warnings:

portlint -AC
WARN: Makefile: [17]: USE_* seen before USES.  According to the porters-handbook, USES must appear first.
WARN: /usr/home/joneum/dev/ports/news/sabnzbdplus/pkg-plist: [320]: installing gettext translation files, please define USES[+]=gettext as appropriate
